name: Acrobat
ability: Each night*, if either good living neighbour is drunk or poisoned, you die.

name: Alchemist
ability: You have a not-in-play Minion ability.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Alchemist has the Boffin ability, the Alchemist does not learn what ability the Demon has.
An Alchemist-Marionette has no Marionette ability & the Marionette is in play.
An Alchemist-Mastermind has no Mastermind ability & the Mastermind is not-in-play.
If the Alchemist has the Organ Grinder ability, the Organ Grinder is in play. If both are sober, both are drunk.
An Alchemist-Spy has no Spy ability & a Spy is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Spy may publicly guess a living player as the Spy. If correct, the Demon must choose the Spy tonight.
The Alchemist-Summoner does not get bluffs, and chooses which Demon but not which player. If they die before this happens, evil wins.

An Alchemist-Widow has no Widow ability & a Widow is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Widow may publicly guess a living player as the Widow. If correct, the Demon must choose the Widow tonight.

An Alchemist-Wraith has no Wraith ability & a Wraith is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Wraith may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.

name: Alsaahir
ability: Each day, if you publicly guess ¶which players are Minion(s) ¶and which are Demon(s), good wins.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.

name: Amnesiac
ability: You do not know what your ability is. ¶Each day, privately guess what it is: ¶you learn how accurate you are.

name: Artist
ability: Once per game, during the day, ¶privately ask the Storyteller any yes/no question.

name: Atheist
ability: The Storyteller can break the game rules, & ¶if executed, good wins, even if you are dead. ¶

jinxes.canonical_text: During a riot, if the Storyteller is nominated, players vote. If they are 'about to die', the game ends. If not, they nominate again.

name: Balloonist
ability: Each night, you learn 1 player of each character type, until there are no more types to learn. ¶

confirmations.signature: Each-night info on a different role-type per night.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Balloonist, an Outsider might have been added during setup.

name: Banshee
ability: If the Demon kills you, all players learn this. ¶From now on, you may nominate twice per day ¶and vote twice per nomination.

jinxes.canonical_text: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
If the Vortox kills the Banshee, all players learn that the Banshee has died.

name: Bounty Hunter
ability: You start knowing 1 evil player. If the player ¶you know dies, you learn another evil player tonight. ¶

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Kazali turns the Bounty Hunter into a Minion, an evil Townsfolk is not created.
If the Philosopher gains the Bounty Hunter ability, a Townsfolk might turn evil.

name: Cannibal
ability: You have the ability of the recently killed executee. ¶If they are evil, you are poisoned until ¶a good player dies by execution.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Cannibal gains the Butler ability, the Cannibal learns this.
If the Juggler guesses on their first day and dies by execution, tonight the living Cannibal learns how many guesses the Juggler got correct.
If the Cannibal nominated, executed, & killed the Princess today, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.
If the Cannibal gains the Zealot ability, the Cannibal learns this.

name: Chambermaid
ability: Each night, choose 2 alive players (not yourself): ¶you learn how many woke tonight due to their ability.

confirmations.signature: Each-night info on who woke during the night.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Chambermaid can detect if the Mathematician will wake tonight.

name: Chef
ability: You start knowing how many pairs ¶of evil players there are.

name: Choirboy
ability: If the Demon kills the King, ¶you learn which player is the Demon.

name: Clockmaker
ability: You start knowing how many steps ¶from the Demon to its nearest Minion.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Clockmaker.

name: Courtier
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a character: ¶they are drunk for 3 nights & 3 days.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.

name: Cult Leader
ability: Each night, you become the alignment ¶of an alive neighbour. If all good players choose ¶to join your cult, your team wins.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Demon has the Cult Leader ability, they can't turn good due to this ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Cult Leader, they can't turn good due to their own ability.

name: Dreamer
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself or Travellers): ¶you learn 1 good & 1 evil character, 1 of which is correct.

name: Empath
ability: Each night, you learn ¶how many of your 2 alive neighbours are evil.

name: Engineer
ability: Once per game, at night, ¶choose which Minions or which Demon is in play.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the living Summoner is removed from play, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Engineer starts knowing this but has no ability.

name: Exorcist
ability: Each night*, choose a player (different to last night): ¶the Demon, if chosen, learns who you are ¶then doesn't wake tonight.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
If Riot nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
If the Exorcist chooses the Yaggababble, the Yaggababble does not kill tonight.

name: Farmer
ability: If you die at night, ¶an alive good player becomes a Farmer.

jinxes.canonical_text: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.

name: Fisherman
ability: Once per game, during the day, ¶visit the Storyteller for some advice ¶to help you win.

name: Flowergirl
ability: Each night*, you learn if ¶a Demon voted today.

name: Fool
ability: The 1st time you die, ¶you don't.

confirmations.signature: Fool's first death does not happen on execution.

proc_confounders.notes: v2 22.2: Lleech is the Demon, not a Minion.

proc_confounders.condition: fool on script but not in play

confirmations.signature: Fool's first death does not happen on a night attack.

name: Fortune Teller
ability: Each night, choose 2 players: you learn if either is a Demon. ¶There is a good player that registers as a Demon to you.

name: Gambler
ability: Each night*, choose a player & guess their character: ¶if you guess wrong, you die.

name: General
ability: Each night, you learn which alignment ¶the Storyteller believes is winning: ¶good, evil, or neither.

name: Gossip
ability: Each day, you may make a public statement. ¶Tonight, if it was true, a player dies.

name: Grandmother
ability: You start knowing a good player & their character. ¶If the Demon kills them, you die too.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
If Riot is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.

name: High Priestess
ability: Each night, learn which player ¶the Storyteller believes you should talk to most.

name: Huntsman
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a living player: ¶the Damsel, if chosen, ¶becomes a not-in-play Townsfolk.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Marionette thinks that they are the Huntsman, the Damsel was added during setup.

name: Innkeeper
ability: Each night*, choose 2 players: ¶they can't die tonight, but ¶1 is drunk until dusk.

confirmations.signature: Innkeeper's two chosen players do not die at night (one is drunk).

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.
If Riot nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.

name: Investigator
ability: You start knowing that 1 of 2 ¶players is a particular Minion.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.

name: Juggler
ability: On your 1st day, publicly guess ¶up to 5 players' characters. ¶That night, you learn how many you got correct.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Juggler guesses on their first day and dies by execution, tonight the living Cannibal learns how many guesses the Juggler got correct.

name: King
ability: Each night, if the dead outnumber the living, ¶you learn 1 alive character. ¶The Demon knows who you are.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.
If Riot is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.

name: Knight
ability: You start knowing 2 players ¶that are not the Demon.

name: Librarian
ability: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players ¶is a particular Outsider. (Or that zero are in play.)

name: Lycanthrope
ability: Each night*, choose a living player: if good, they die, ¶but they are the only player that can die tonight.

name: Magician
ability: The Demon thinks you are a Minion. ¶Minions think you are a Demon.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Magician wakes with Legion and might register as evil. Legion knows if a Magician is in play, but not which player it is.
If the Magician is alive, the Demon doesn't know which neighbor is the Marionette.
When the Spy sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.
If the Vizier is in play, the Magician has no ability but is immune to the Vizier's ability.
When the Widow sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.
After each execution, the living Magician may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.
If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta.

name: Mathematician
ability: Each night, you learn how many ¶players' abilities worked abnormally (since dawn) ¶due to another character's ability.

confirmations.signature: Each-night info on how many abilities worked abnormally.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Chambermaid can detect if the Mathematician will wake tonight.
The Mathematician might learn if the Drunk's ability yielded false info or failed to work properly.
The Mathematician might learn if the Lunatic attacks a different player than the real Demon attacked.
The Mathematician might learn if the Marionette's ability yielded false info or failed to work properly.

name: Mayor
ability: If only 3 players live & ¶no execution occurs, your team wins. ¶If you die at night, another player might die instead.

confirmations.signature: Player claims Mayor; alt-win-lane requires good to skip execution at final 3.

claim_confounders.notes: v2 22.7: good-on-good doubt rather than evil bluff.

claim_confounders.condition: mayor on script but not in play

confirmations.signature: Mayor is attacked at night; another player dies instead.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan and the Mayor are alive on day 5 & no execution occurs, good wins.
The Mayor may choose to stop the riot. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, good wins. Otherwise, evil wins.

name: Minstrel
ability: When a Minion dies by execution, ¶all other players (except Travellers) ¶are drunk until dusk tomorrow.

jinxes.canonical_text: If Legion died by execution today, Legion keeps their ability, but the Minstrel might learn they are Legion.

name: Monk
ability: Each night*, choose a player (not yourself): ¶they are safe from the Demon tonight.

confirmations.signature: Monk's chosen player does not die from the Demon at night.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.
If Riot nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.

name: Nightwatchman
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: ¶they learn who you are.

name: Noble
ability: You start knowing 3 players, ¶1 and only 1 of which is evil.

name: Oracle
ability: Each night*, you learn ¶how many dead players are evil.

confirmations.signature: Each-night info on how many dead players are evil.

name: Pacifist
ability: Executed good players ¶might not die.

confirmations.signature: Executed good player does not die.

proc_confounders.notes: v2 22.2: Lleech is the Demon, not a Minion.

proc_confounders.condition: pacifist on script but not in play

name: Philosopher
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a good character: ¶gain that ability. ¶If this character is in play, they are drunk.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Philosopher gains the Bounty Hunter ability, a Townsfolk might turn evil.

name: Pixie
ability: You start knowing 1 in-play Townsfolk. ¶If you were mad that you were this character, ¶you gain their ability when they die.

name: Poppy Grower
ability: Minions & Demons do not know each other. ¶If you die, they learn who each other are that night.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Spy does not see the Grimoire.
If the Poppy Grower is alive on the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon but not which player.
If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Widow does not see the Grimoire.
If Lil' Monsta & the Poppy Grower are alive, Minions wake one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.

name: Preacher
ability: Each night, choose a player: ¶a Minion, if chosen, learns this. ¶All chosen Minions have no ability.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.
If the Preacher chooses Legion, Legion keeps their ability, but the Preacher might learn they are Legion.

name: Princess
ability: On your 1st day, if you nominated and executed a player, ¶the Demon doesn't kill tonight.

confirmations.signature: Demon does not kill on night 1 if Princess nominated and executed a player that day.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Cannibal nominated, executed, & killed the Princess today, the Demon doesn't kill tonight.
If the Princess nominated & executed a player on their 1st day, no one dies to the Al-Hadikhia tonight.

name: Professor
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a dead player: ¶if they are a Townsfolk, they are resurrected.

confirmations.signature: Dead Townsfolk publicly resurrects in response to Professor's choice.

proc_confounders.condition: professor on script but not in play

name: Ravenkeeper
ability: If you die at night, you are woken to choose a player: ¶you learn their character.

jinxes.canonical_text: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.

name: Sage
ability: If the Demon kills you, ¶you learn that it is 1 of 2 players.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Recluse might register as the Demon to the Sage.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.

name: Sailor
ability: Each night, choose an alive player: ¶either you or they are drunk until dusk. ¶You can't die.

confirmations.signature: Sailor is executed and does not die.

proc_confounders.notes: v2 22.2: Lleech is the Demon, not a Minion.

proc_confounders.condition: sailor on script but not in play

confirmations.signature: Sailor does not die at night.

name: Savant
ability: Each day, you may visit the Storyteller ¶to learn 2 things in private: 1 is true & 1 is false.

name: Seamstress
ability: Once per game, at night, ¶choose 2 players (not yourself): ¶you learn if they are the same alignment.

name: Shugenja
ability: You start knowing if your closest evil player ¶is clockwise or anti-clockwise. ¶If equidistant, this info is arbitrary.

name: Slayer
ability: Once per game, during the day, ¶publicly choose a player: ¶if they are the Demon, they die.

confirmations.signature: Slayer's public day-time shot kills a player.

proc_confounders.notes: Spy registers as Demon to Slayer's shot.
Recluse may misregister as Demon; kill happens, proof ambiguous.
Star-pass: Slayer kills Imp, SW becomes Imp, game continues.

proc_confounders.condition: slayer on script but not in play

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Slayer slays the Lleech host, the host dies.

name: Snake Charmer
ability: Each night, choose an alive player: a chosen Demon ¶swaps characters & alignments with you & ¶is then poisoned.

name: Soldier
ability: You are safe ¶from the Demon.

confirmations.signature: Soldier is chosen by the Demon at night and does not die.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.
If Riot nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

name: Steward
ability: You start knowing ¶1 good player.

name: Tea Lady
ability: If both your alive neighbours are good, ¶they can't die.

confirmations.signature: Tea Lady's neighbour is executed and does not die.

proc_confounders.notes: v2 22.2: Lleech is the Demon, not a Minion.

proc_confounders.condition: tea-lady on script but not in play

confirmations.signature: Tea Lady's neighbours do not die at night when the Demon attacks them.

name: Town Crier
ability: Each night*, you learn if ¶a Minion nominated today.

name: Undertaker
ability: Each night*, you learn ¶which character died by execution today.

confirmations.signature: Each-night info on which character died by execution today.

name: Village Idiot
ability: Each night, choose a player: ¶you learn their alignment. ¶
setup: [+0 to +2 Village Idiots. 1 of the extras is drunk]

jinxes.canonical_text: If there is a spare token, the Boffin can give the Demon the Village Idiot ability.
If there is a spare token, the Pit-Hag can create an extra Village Idiot. If so, the drunk Village Idiot might change.

name: Virgin
ability: The 1st time you are nominated, ¶if the nominator is a Townsfolk, ¶they are executed immediately.

confirmations.signature: Townsfolk nominator dies on first nomination of Virgin.

proc_confounders.notes: Spy registers as Townsfolk; Virgin proc fires, game continues.
Recluse may misregister as not-Townsfolk and suppress proc.
Marionette is a Minion who thinks they are Townsfolk; nomination does not fire the proc, but neither player knows why.

proc_confounders.condition: virgin on script but not in play

name: Washerwoman
ability: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players ¶is a particular Townsfolk.

name: Barber
ability: If you died today or tonight, the Demon may ¶choose 2 players (not another Demon) ¶to swap characters.

name: Butler
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): ¶tomorrow, you may only vote if they are voting too.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Cannibal gains the Butler ability, the Cannibal learns this.
If the Organ Grinder is causing eyes closed voting, the Butler may raise their hand to vote but their vote is only counted if their master voted too.

name: Damsel
ability: All Minions know you are in play. ¶If a Minion publicly guesses you (once), ¶your team loses.

jinxes.canonical_text: If a Pit-Hag creates a Damsel, the Storyteller chooses which player it is.
If the Spy is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.
If the Widow is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.

name: Drunk
ability: You do not know you are the Drunk. ¶You think you are a Townsfolk character, ¶but you are not.

generic_confirmation_counterpart.caveat: Undermines claims; does not fake the proc.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Mathematician might learn if the Drunk's ability yielded false info or failed to work properly.
The Demon cannot have the Drunk ability.

name: Golem
ability: You may only nominate once per game. ¶When you do, if the nominee is not the Demon, ¶they die.

name: Goon
ability: Each night, the 1st player to choose you ¶with their ability is drunk until dusk. ¶You become their alignment.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Demon has the Goon ability, they can't turn good due to this ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Goon, they can't turn good due to their own ability.

name: Hatter
ability: If you died today or tonight, ¶the Minion and Demon players may choose ¶new Minion and Demon characters to be.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Hatter has no ability.
The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
If the Hatter dies & the Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become.

name: Heretic
ability: Whoever wins, loses ¶& whoever loses, wins, ¶even if you are dead.

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
The Demon cannot have the Heretic ability.

name: Hermit
ability: You have all Outsider abilities.

name: Klutz
ability: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player: if they are evil, your team loses.

name: Lunatic
ability: You think you are a Demon, but you are not. ¶The Demon knows who you are & ¶who you choose at night.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Mathematician might learn if the Lunatic attacks a different player than the real Demon attacked.

name: Moonchild
ability: When you learn that you died, publicly choose 1 alive player. Tonight, if it was a good player, they die.

name: Mutant
ability: If you are "mad" about being an Outsider, ¶you might be executed.

name: Ogre
ability: On your 1st night, choose a player (not yourself): ¶you become their alignment (you don't know which) ¶even if drunk or poisoned.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Recluse registers as evil to the Ogre, the Ogre learns that they are evil.
The Demon cannot have the Ogre ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Ogre, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
The Spy registers as evil to the Ogre.

name: Plague Doctor
ability: When you die, the Storyteller gains ¶a Minion ability.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Storyteller would gain the Baron ability, up to two players become Outsiders.
If the Storyteller would gain the Boomdandy ability, a player becomes the Boomdandy.
If the Storyteller would gain the Evil Twin ability, a player becomes the Evil Twin.
If the Storyteller would gain the Fearmonger ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
If the Storyteller would gain the Goblin ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
If the Storyteller would gain the Marionette ability, one of the Demon's good neighbors becomes the Marionette.
If the Storyteller would gain the Scarlet Woman ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
If the Storyteller would gain the Spy ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
If the Storyteller would gain the Wraith ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

name: Politician
ability: If you were the player most responsible ¶for your team losing, you change alignment & win, ¶even if dead.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Demon cannot have the Politician ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Politician, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
The Politician might register as evil to the Vizier.
The Politician might register as evil to Legion.

name: Puzzlemaster
ability: 1 player is drunk, even if you die. ¶If you guess (once) who it is, learn the Demon player, ¶but guess wrong & get false info.

name: Recluse
ability: You might register as evil & ¶as a Minion or Demon, ¶even if dead.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Recluse registers as evil to the Ogre, the Ogre learns that they are evil.
The Recluse might register as the Demon to the Sage.

name: Saint
ability: If you die by execution, ¶your team loses.

name: Snitch
ability: Minions start knowing 3 not-in-play characters.

name: Sweetheart
ability: When you die, ¶1 player is drunk from now on.

name: Tinker
ability: You might die at any time.

name: Zealot
ability: If there are 5 or more players alive, ¶you must vote for every nomination.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Cannibal gains the Zealot ability, the Cannibal learns this.
The Zealot might register as evil to the Vizier.
The Zealot might register as evil to Legion.

name: Assassin
ability: Once per game, at night*, choose a player: ¶they die, even if for some reason they could not.

name: Baron
ability: There are extra Outsiders in play. ¶

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
If the Storyteller would gain the Baron ability, up to two players become Outsiders.

name: Boffin
ability: The Demon (even if drunk or poisoned) ¶has a not-in-play good character's ability. ¶You both know which.

generic_confirmation_counterpart.scope: any confirmable good-team ability that is on script but not in play
generic_confirmation_counterpart.caveat: Boffin-as-X only fires when X is on script but not in play, and Boffin must survive.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Alchemist has the Boffin ability, the Alchemist does not learn what ability the Demon has.
If the Demon has the Cult Leader ability, they can't turn good due to this ability.
The Demon cannot have the Drunk ability.
If the Demon has the Goon ability, they can't turn good due to this ability.
The Demon cannot have the Heretic ability.
The Demon cannot have the Ogre ability.
The Demon cannot have the Politician ability.
If there is a spare token, the Boffin can give the Demon the Village Idiot ability.

name: Boomdandy
ability: If you are executed, all but 3 players die. ¶1 minute later, ¶the player with the most players pointing at them dies.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Storyteller would gain the Boomdandy ability, a player becomes the Boomdandy.

name: Cerenovus
ability: Each night, choose a player & a good character: ¶they are mad they are this character tomorrow, ¶or might be executed.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Cerenovus may choose to make a player mad that they are the Goblin.

name: Devil's Advocate
ability: Each night, choose a living player ¶(different to last night): ¶if executed tomorrow, they don't die.

name: Evil Twin
ability: You & an opposing player know each other. ¶If the good player is executed, evil wins. ¶Good can't win if you both live.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Storyteller would gain the Evil Twin ability, a player becomes the Evil Twin.

name: Fearmonger
ability: Each night, choose a player: ¶if you nominate & execute them, their team loses. ¶All players know if you choose a new player.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Storyteller would gain the Fearmonger ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
The Vizier wakes with the Fearmonger, learns who they choose and cannot choose to immediately execute that player.

name: Goblin
ability: If you publicly claim ¶to be the Goblin when nominated & ¶are executed that day, your team wins.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Storyteller would gain the Goblin ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
The Cerenovus may choose to make a player mad that they are the Goblin.

name: Godfather
ability: You start knowing which Outsiders are in play. ¶If 1 died today, choose a player tonight: they die. ¶

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

name: Harpy
ability: Each night, choose 2 players: ¶tomorrow, the 1st player is mad that the 2nd is evil, ¶or one or both might die.

name: Marionette
ability: You think you are a good character, but you are not. ¶The Demon knows who you are. ¶

jinxes.canonical_text: An Alchemist-Marionette has no Marionette ability & the Marionette is in play.
If the Magician is alive, the Demon doesn't know which neighbor is the Marionette.
The Mathematician might learn if the Marionette's ability yielded false info or failed to work properly.
If the Storyteller would gain the Marionette ability, one of the Demon's good neighbors becomes the Marionette.
If the Marionette thinks that they are the Balloonist, an Outsider might have been added during setup.
If the Marionette thinks that they are the Huntsman, the Damsel was added during setup.
If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.

name: Mastermind
ability: If the Demon dies by execution (ending the game), ¶play for 1 more day. ¶If a player is then executed, their team loses.

jinxes.canonical_text: An Alchemist-Mastermind has no Mastermind ability & the Mastermind is not-in-play.
A Mastermind that has their ability keeps it if the Vigormortis dies.
If the Al-Hadikhia dies by execution, and the Mastermind is alive, the Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 good players tonight: if all 3 choose to live, evil wins. Otherwise, good wins.
If the Mastermind is alive and the Lleech host dies by execution, the Lleech lives but loses their ability.

name: Mezepheles
ability: You start knowing a secret word. ¶The 1st good player to say this word ¶becomes evil that night.

name: Organ Grinder
ability: All players keep their eyes closed when voting ¶and the vote tally is secret. ¶Each night, choose if you are drunk until dusk.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Alchemist has the Organ Grinder ability, the Organ Grinder is in play. If both are sober, both are drunk.
If the Organ Grinder is causing eyes closed voting, the Butler may raise their hand to vote but their vote is only counted if their master voted too.

name: Pit-Hag
ability: Each night*, choose a player & ¶a character they become (if not in play). ¶If a Demon is made, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Cult Leader, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If a Pit-Hag creates a Damsel, the Storyteller chooses which player it is.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Goon, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Ogre, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If the Pit-Hag turns an evil player into the Politician, they can't turn good due to their own ability.
If there is a spare token, the Pit-Hag can create an extra Village Idiot. If so, the drunk Village Idiot might change.
If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.

name: Poisoner
ability: Each night, choose a player: ¶they are poisoned tonight and tomorrow day.

name: Psychopath
ability: Each day, before nominations, ¶you may publicly choose a player: they die. ¶If executed, you only die if you lose roshambo.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Psychopath is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

name: Scarlet Woman
ability: If there are 5 or more players alive & the Demon dies, ¶you become the Demon. (Travellers don't count.)

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Storyteller would gain the Scarlet Woman ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman becomes the Scarlet Woman again.
If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman remains the Scarlet Woman.
If Lil' Monsta dies with 5 or more players alive, the Scarlet Woman babysits Lil' Monsta for the rest of the game.

name: Spy
ability: Each night, you see the Grimoire. ¶You might register as good & as a Townsfolk or Outsider, even if dead.

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
An Alchemist-Spy has no Spy ability & a Spy is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Spy may publicly guess a living player as the Spy. If correct, the Demon must choose the Spy tonight.
When the Spy sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.
If the Storyteller would gain the Spy ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.
If the Spy is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.
The Spy registers as evil to the Ogre.
If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Spy does not see the Grimoire.

name: Summoner
ability: You get 3 bluffs. On the 3rd night, ¶choose a player: they become ¶an evil Demon of your choice.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Alchemist-Summoner does not get bluffs, and chooses which Demon but not which player. If they die before this happens, evil wins.
If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
The Summoner registers as the Demon to the Clockmaker.
If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
If the living Summoner is removed from play, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
If a Lord of Typhon is summoned, they must neighbor a Minion & their other neighbor becomes an evil Minion.
If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.
If the Poppy Grower is alive on the 3rd night, the Summoner chooses which Demon but not which player.
If the living Summoner has no ability, the Storyteller has the Summoner ability.
The Summoner may summon a Pukka on the 2nd night instead of the 3rd.
If the Summoner summons a dead player into the Zombuul, the Zombuul has already 'died once'.
If Legion is summoned, all evil players become Legion.

name: Vizier
ability: All players know you are the Vizier. ¶You cannot die during the day. If good voted, ¶you may choose to execute immediately.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Vizier is in play, the Magician has no ability but is immune to the Vizier's ability.
The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.
If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.
The Vizier wakes with the Fearmonger, learns who they choose and cannot choose to immediately execute that player.
The Storyteller doesn't declare the Vizier is in play.
The Politician might register as evil to the Vizier.
If the Vizier loses their ability, they learn this, and cannot die during the day.
The Zealot might register as evil to the Vizier.
If the Vizier is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

name: Widow
ability: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & ¶choose a player: they are poisoned. ¶1 good player knows a Widow is in play.

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

An Alchemist-Widow has no Widow ability & a Widow is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Widow may publicly guess a living player as the Widow. If correct, the Demon must choose the Widow tonight.
When the Widow sees the Grimoire, the Demon and Magician's character tokens are removed.
If the Widow is (or has been) in play, the Damsel is poisoned.
If the Poppy Grower has their ability, the Widow does not see the Grimoire.

name: Witch
ability: Each night, choose a player: ¶if they nominate tomorrow, they die. ¶If just 3 players live, you lose this ability.

name: Wizard
ability: Once per game, choose to make a wish. ¶If granted, it might have a price and ¶leave a clue as to its nature.

name: Wraith
ability: You may choose to open your eyes at night. ¶You wake when other evil players do.

jinxes.canonical_text: An Alchemist-Wraith has no Wraith ability & a Wraith is in play. After each execution, a living Alchemist-Wraith may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.
After each execution, the living Magician may publicly guess a living player as the Wraith. If correct, the Demon must choose the Wraith tonight.
If the Storyteller would gain the Wraith ability, a Minion gains it, and learns this.

name: Xaan
ability: On night X, all Townsfolk are poisoned until dusk. ¶

name: Al-Hadikhia
ability: Each night*, choose 3 players (all players learn who): ¶each silently chooses to live or die, ¶but if all live, all die.

jinxes.canonical_text: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman becomes the Scarlet Woman again.
If the Al-Hadikhia dies by execution, and the Mastermind is alive, the Al-Hadikhia chooses 3 good players tonight: if all 3 choose to live, evil wins. Otherwise, good wins.
If the Princess nominated & executed a player on their 1st day, no one dies to the Al-Hadikhia tonight.

name: Fang Gu
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶The 1st Outsider this kills becomes an evil Fang Gu & ¶you die instead.

jinxes.canonical_text: If there would be two Demons, one of which was the Scarlet Woman, the Scarlet Woman remains the Scarlet Woman.

name: Imp
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶If you kill yourself this way, ¶a Minion becomes the Imp.

name: Kazali
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶
setup: [You choose which players are which Minions. -? to +? Outsiders]

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Kazali turns the Bounty Hunter into a Minion, an evil Townsfolk is not created.
If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
If the Summoner creates a second living Demon, deaths tonight are arbitrary.

name: Legion
ability: Each night*, a player might die. ¶Executions fail if only evil voted. You register as a Minion too.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Magician wakes with Legion and might register as evil. Legion knows if a Magician is in play, but not which player it is.
If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Engineer starts knowing this but has no ability.
If Legion is created, all evil players become Legion. If Legion is in play, the Hatter has no ability.
If Legion died by execution today, Legion keeps their ability, but the Minstrel might learn they are Legion.
The Politician might register as evil to Legion.
If the Preacher chooses Legion, Legion keeps their ability, but the Preacher might learn they are Legion.
If Legion is summoned, all evil players become Legion.
The Zealot might register as evil to Legion.

name: Leviathan
ability: If more than 1 good player is executed, you win. ¶All players know you are in play. ¶After day 5, evil wins.

jinxes.canonical_text: Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.
If the Leviathan is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.
If the Leviathan is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.
If the Leviathan and the Mayor are alive on day 5 & no execution occurs, good wins.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.
The Leviathan cannot enter play after day 5.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.
Each night*, the Leviathan chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.
If the Leviathan nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

name: Lil' Monsta
ability: Each night, Minions choose who ¶babysits Lil' Monsta's token & "is the Demon". ¶A player dies each night*.

jinxes.canonical_text: If there would be a Marionette in play, they enter play after the Demon & must start as their neighbor.
If the Hatter dies & the Demon chooses Lil' Monsta, they also choose a Minion to become.
If the Magician is alive, the Storyteller chooses which Minion babysits Lil' Monsta.
If Lil' Monsta & the Poppy Grower are alive, Minions wake one by one, until one of them chooses to take the Lil' Monsta token.
If the Psychopath is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.
If Lil' Monsta dies with 5 or more players alive, the Scarlet Woman babysits Lil' Monsta for the rest of the game.
If the Vizier is babysitting Lil' Monsta, they die when executed.

name: Lleech
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶You start by choosing an alive player: they are poisoned. You die if & only if they die.

jinxes.canonical_text: Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.
If the Mastermind is alive and the Lleech host dies by execution, the Lleech lives but loses their ability.
If the Slayer slays the Lleech host, the host dies.

name: Lord of Typhon
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶
setup: [Evil characters are in a line. You are in the middle. ¶+1 Minion. -? to +? Outsiders]

jinxes.canonical_text: If a Lord of Typhon is summoned, they must neighbor a Minion & their other neighbor becomes an evil Minion.

name: No Dashii
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶Your 2 Townsfolk neighbours are poisoned.

name: Ojo
ability: Each night*, choose a character: they die. ¶If they are not in play, ¶the Storyteller chooses who dies.

name: Po
ability: Each night*, you may choose a player: they die. ¶If your last choice was no-one, choose 3 players tonight.

name: Pukka
ability: Each night, choose a player: they are poisoned. ¶The previously poisoned player dies ¶then becomes healthy.

jinxes.canonical_text: The Summoner may summon a Pukka on the 2nd night instead of the 3rd.

name: Riot
ability: Nominees die, but may nominate again immediately (on day 3, they must). ¶After day 3, evil wins.

jinxes.canonical_text: During a riot, if the Storyteller is nominated, players vote. If they are 'about to die', the game ends. If not, they nominate again.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Banshee dies & gains their ability.
If Riot nominates and executes the Exorcist-chosen player, good wins.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Farmer uses their ability but does not die.
If Riot is in play and the Grandchild dies by execution, evil wins.
If Riot nominates and executes an Innkeeper-protected player, good wins.
If Riot is in play, and at least 1 player is dead, the King learns an alive character each night.
The Mayor may choose to stop the riot. If they do so when only 1 Riot is alive, good wins. Otherwise, evil wins.
If Riot nominates and executes the Monk-protected player, good wins.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Ravenkeeper uses their ability but does not die.
Each night*, Riot chooses an alive good player (different to previous nights): a chosen Sage uses their ability but does not die.
If Riot nominates and executes the Soldier, good wins.

name: Shabaloth
ability: Each night*, choose 2 players: they die. ¶A dead player you chose last night ¶might be regurgitated.

name: Vigormortis
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶Minions you kill keep their ability & ¶poison 1 Townsfolk neighbour.

jinxes.canonical_text: A Mastermind that has their ability keeps it if the Vigormortis dies.

name: Vortox
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. ¶Townsfolk abilities yield false info. ¶Each day, if no-one is executed, evil wins.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Vortox kills the Banshee, all players learn that the Banshee has died.

name: Yaggababble
ability: You start knowing a secret phrase. ¶For each time you said it publicly today, ¶a player might die.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Exorcist chooses the Yaggababble, the Yaggababble does not kill tonight.

name: Zombuul
ability: Each night*, if no-one died today, ¶choose a player: they die. ¶The 1st time you die, you live but register as dead.

jinxes.canonical_text: If the Summoner summons a dead player into the Zombuul, the Zombuul has already 'died once'.

name: Apprentice
ability: On your 1st night, you gain a Townsfolk ability (if good) or a Minion ability (if evil).

name: Barista
ability: Each night, until dusk, 1) a player becomes sober, healthy & gets true info, or 2) their ability works twice. They learn which.

name: Beggar
ability: You must use a vote token to vote. Dead players may choose to give you theirs. If so, you learn their alignment. You are sober & healthy.

name: Bishop
ability: Only the Storyteller can nominate. At least 1 opposite player must be nominated each day.

name: Bone Collector
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a dead player: they regain their ability until dusk.

name: Bureaucrat
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): their vote counts as 3 votes tomorrow.

name: Butcher
ability: Each day, after the 1st execution, you may nominate again.

name: Cacklejack
ability: Each day, choose a player: a different player changes character tonight.

name: Deviant
ability: If you were funny today, you cannot die by exile.

name: Gangster
ability: Once per day, you may choose to kill an alive neighbour, if your other alive neighbour agrees.

name: Gnome
ability: All players start knowing a player of your alignment. You may choose to kill anyone who nominates them.

name: Gunslinger
ability: Each day, after the 1st vote has been tallied, you may choose a player that voted: they die.

name: Harlot
ability: Each night*, choose a living player: if they agree, you learn their character, but you both might die.

name: Judge
ability: Once per game, if another player nominated, you may choose to force the current execution to pass or fail.

name: Matron
ability: Each day, you may choose up to 3 sets of 2 players to swap seats. Players may not leave their seats to talk in private.

name: Scapegoat
ability: If a player of your alignment is executed, you might be executed instead.

name: Thief
ability: Each night, choose a player (not yourself): their vote counts negatively tomorrow.

name: Voudon
ability: Only you & the dead can vote. They don't need a vote token to do so. A 50% majority isn't required.

name: Angel
ability: Something bad might happen to whoever is most responsible for the death of a new player.

name: Bootlegger
ability: This script has homebrew characters or rules.

name: Buddhist
ability: For the first 2 minutes of each day, veteran players may not talk.

name: Deus ex Fiasco
ability: At least once per game, the Storyteller will make a mistake, correct it, and publicly admit to it.

name: Djinn
ability: Use the Djinn's special rule. All players know what it is.

name: Doomsayer
ability: If 4 or more players live, each living player may publicly choose (once per game) that a player of their own alignment dies.

name: Duchess
ability: Each day, 3 players may choose to visit you. At night*, each visitor learns how many visitors are evil, but 1 gets false info.

name: Ferryman
ability: On the final day, all dead players regain their vote token.

name: Fibbin
ability: Once per game, 1 good player might get incorrect information.

name: Fiddler
ability: Once per game, the Demon secretly chooses an opposing player: all players choose which of these 2 players win.

name: Gardener
ability: The Storyteller assigns all players' characters.

name: Hell's Librarian
ability: Something bad might happen to whoever talks when the Storyteller has asked for silence.

name: Revolutionary
ability: 2 neighboring players are known to be the same alignment. Once per game, 1 of them registers falsely.

name: Sentinel
ability: There might be 1 extra or 1 fewer Outsider in play.

name: Spirit of Ivory
ability: There can't be more than 1 extra evil player.

name: Storm Catcher
ability: Name a good character. If in play, they can only die by execution, but evil players learn which player it is.

name: Toymaker
ability: The Demon may choose not to attack and must do this at least once per game. Evil players get normal starting info.
